texts.label: section_header
texts.orig: Understanding the importance of the supply continuity
texts.text: Understanding the importance of the supply continuity

texts.label: text
texts.orig: Carbon dioxide (CO2) is in varying concentrations a natural part of our air. It is colorless, tasteless, nonflammable, with very faint sour odor and about 1.5 times heavier than air.
texts.text: Carbon dioxide (CO2) is in varying concentrations a natural part of our air. It is colorless, tasteless, nonflammable, with very faint sour odor and about 1.5 times heavier than air.

texts.label: text
texts.orig: CO2 is almost inert, has a high solubility in water, and bacteriostatic and fungistatic effect, i.e. it has an inhibitory effect on bacteria and fungi. Under atmospheric pressure carbon dioxide exists only as a gas or in solid form as dry ice (sublimation point at -78.5°C). In order to attain a liquid form, CO2 must be put under a pressure of more than 5.18 bar. As dry ice, CO2 has another interesting feature: it does not melt under normal conditions, but sublimates, i.e. it goes directly from a solid to a gaseous state.
texts.text: CO2 is almost inert, has a high solubility in water, and bacteriostatic and fungistatic effect, i.e. it has an inhibitory effect on bacteria and fungi. Under atmospheric pressure carbon dioxide exists only as a gas or in solid form as dry ice (sublimation point at -78.5°C). In order to attain a liquid form, CO2 must be put under a pressure of more than 5.18 bar. As dry ice, CO2 has another interesting feature: it does not melt under normal conditions, but sublimates, i.e. it goes directly from a solid to a gaseous state.

texts.label: text
texts.orig: At last, in a so-called hypercritical state (pressure> 74 bar, temperature> 31°C) it is an excellent solvent.
texts.text: At last, in a so-called hypercritical state (pressure> 74 bar, temperature> 31°C) it is an excellent solvent.

texts.label: section_header
texts.orig: Our Supply Chain is engineered and monitored to ensure on time Carbon Dioxide deliveries
texts.text: Our Supply Chain is engineered and monitored to ensure on time Carbon Dioxide deliveries

texts.label: section_header
texts.orig: How do we manage the CO2 supply for our Customers?
texts.text: How do we manage the CO2 supply for our Customers?

texts.label: text
texts.orig: We recover raw CO2 gas as a normal 'By Product' of industrial processes. To improve the supply reliability , we have diversified our raw gas portfolio thanks to new BIO Ethanol sources.
texts.text: We recover raw CO2 gas as a normal 'By Product' of industrial processes. To improve the supply reliability , we have diversified our raw gas portfolio thanks to new BIO Ethanol sources.

texts.label: text
texts.orig: We have our own Engineering & Construction division providing 'In House' LCO2 technology for gas compression, purification and liquefaction.
texts.text: We have our own Engineering & Construction division providing 'In House' LCO2 technology for gas compression, purification and liquefaction.

texts.label: text
texts.orig: We manage a European Laboratories Network consistently auditing the quality of the raw gas and the final product (LCO2).
texts.text: We manage a European Laboratories Network consistently auditing the quality of the raw gas and the final product (LCO2).

texts.label: text
texts.orig: Over last decades we have built the largest production network over Europe .  Every day we control more than 400 movable road and rail assets reducing environmental impact.
texts.text: Over last decades we have built the largest production network over Europe .  Every day we control more than 400 movable road and rail assets reducing environmental impact.

texts.label: text
texts.orig: For more than 3 000 customers all over the continent we provide the expertise in customer installation design (storage tank & vaporizers) suitable for specific gas application.
texts.text: For more than 3 000 customers all over the continent we provide the expertise in customer installation design (storage tank & vaporizers) suitable for specific gas application.

texts.label: text
texts.orig: Thanks to our Industrial Management System we run our daily business with the highest standards for Safety, Reliability and Sustainability.
texts.text: Thanks to our Industrial Management System we run our daily business with the highest standards for Safety, Reliability and Sustainability.

texts.orig: To satisfy your industrial process needs, we have designed a set of branded solutions
texts.text: To satisfy your industrial process needs, we have designed a set of branded solutions

texts.text: How do we differ on the Carbon Dioxide market?

texts.label: text
texts.orig: Food-grade  gas to  address  the  food  safety  regulations  for  the whole food and beverages value chains with large and tailor-made solutions for each food segment, ensuring total quality and skilled approach of contamination risks mastery.
texts.text: Food-grade  gas to  address  the  food  safety  regulations  for  the whole food and beverages value chains with large and tailor-made solutions for each food segment, ensuring total quality and skilled approach of contamination risks mastery.

texts.label: text
texts.orig: Compliant gases for the pharmaceutical and biotech industries ,  specifically  designed  to  respect  pharmaceutical  best practices,  and  ensuring  total  quality  of  products  and  services.  Air Liquide is the ideal provider for the entire pharmaceutical value chain.
texts.text: Compliant gases for the pharmaceutical and biotech industries ,  specifically  designed  to  respect  pharmaceutical  best practices,  and  ensuring  total  quality  of  products  and  services.  Air Liquide is the ideal provider for the entire pharmaceutical value chain.

texts.label: text
texts.orig: Mixing  component  for premium  shielding  gases  delivered with innovative TOPs or in liquid. They are mainly used in automotive and metal fabrication.
texts.text: Mixing  component  for premium  shielding  gases  delivered with innovative TOPs or in liquid. They are mainly used in automotive and metal fabrication.

texts.label: text
texts.orig: Component for lasing gas mixtures of CO2 laser sources . They are used for laser cutting and welding applications in automotive and metal fabrication.
texts.text: Component for lasing gas mixtures of CO2 laser sources . They are used for laser cutting and welding applications in automotive and metal fabrication.

texts.label: text
texts.orig: Innovative  solutions  to  address water  treatment in  order  to increase  economical  performances  and  improve  environmental records thanks to comprehensive four turnkey offers: drinking water, cooling water, process & waste water.
texts.text: Innovative  solutions  to  address water  treatment in  order  to increase  economical  performances  and  improve  environmental records thanks to comprehensive four turnkey offers: drinking water, cooling water, process & waste water.

texts.label: text
texts.orig: By  a  natural  phenomenon,  solid  CO2  called  Dry  Ice  (-78°C)  is subliming into cold gas. It is mainly used for transportation under controlled  temperature,  temperature  regulations,  clean blasting, cold fitting, cryo-grinding .
texts.text: By  a  natural  phenomenon,  solid  CO2  called  Dry  Ice  (-78°C)  is subliming into cold gas. It is mainly used for transportation under controlled  temperature,  temperature  regulations,  clean blasting, cold fitting, cryo-grinding .

texts.label: section_header
texts.orig: The Highest Quality Carbon Dioxide supplied by Air Liquide is a recovered by-product from industrial and BIO processes
texts.text: The Highest Quality Carbon Dioxide supplied by Air Liquide is a recovered by-product from industrial and BIO processes

texts.label: section_header
texts.orig: Because we recover our raw CO2 gas, no new carbon dioxide enters the atmosphere
texts.text: Because we recover our raw CO2 gas, no new carbon dioxide enters the atmosphere

texts.label: text
texts.orig: The By-Product Carbon Dioxide we process and liquefy used to come mainly from the ammonia and petrochemical industry. In recent years a BIO Ethanol industry has developed in Europe and Air Liquide has invested in new LCO2 plants processing BIO Carbon Dioxide originating from natural fermentation of biomass (cereals, sugar beets,…).
texts.text: The By-Product Carbon Dioxide we process and liquefy used to come mainly from the ammonia and petrochemical industry. In recent years a BIO Ethanol industry has developed in Europe and Air Liquide has invested in new LCO2 plants processing BIO Carbon Dioxide originating from natural fermentation of biomass (cereals, sugar beets,…).

texts.label: section_header
texts.orig: BIO Carbon Dioxide processed by Air Liquide
texts.text: BIO Carbon Dioxide processed by Air Liquide

texts.label: text
texts.orig: Air  Liquide  is  now  the  leader  in  BIO Carbon Dioxide on the European Market. We  process  and  liquefy  more  than 20% of the total Carbon Dioxide with natural fermentation  origin.  These  new  BIO  sources, diversifying our sourcing portfolio, have made us more reliable in product supply.
texts.text: Air  Liquide  is  now  the  leader  in  BIO Carbon Dioxide on the European Market. We  process  and  liquefy  more  than 20% of the total Carbon Dioxide with natural fermentation  origin.  These  new  BIO  sources, diversifying our sourcing portfolio, have made us more reliable in product supply.

texts.label: section_header
texts.orig: We care about today and tomorrow
texts.text: We care about today and tomorrow

texts.label: text
texts.orig: More  than  70%  of  the  Carbon  Dioxide  we process  and  liquefy  is  applied  in  the  food industry. Air Liquide provides the highest food grade product certified by The Foundation for Food Safety Certification (FSSC 22 000).
texts.text: More  than  70%  of  the  Carbon  Dioxide  we process  and  liquefy  is  applied  in  the  food industry. Air Liquide provides the highest food grade product certified by The Foundation for Food Safety Certification (FSSC 22 000).

texts.label: text
texts.orig: We are constantly investing to upgrade our Supply Chain to meet the highest expectations.  Every  year  we  optimize  the number of kilometers we drive to reduce the CO2 emission for the product we transport.

texts.label: text
texts.orig: World leader in gases, technologies and services for Industry and Health, Air Liquide is present in 80 countries with more than 50,000 employees and serves more than 2 million customers and patients. Oxygen, nitrogen and hydrogen have been at the core of the company's activities since its creation in 1902. Air Liquide's ambition is to be the leader in its industry, delivering long-term performance and acting responsibly.
